title: bank of england / balance sheet / asset purchase facility | Balance Sheet Update | Consolidated balance sheet - 31 December 2024
summary: The Bank of England published its consolidated balance sheet as of 31 December 2024, showing total assets and liabilities of £855.1 billion, with reserves balances at £711.6 billion and loan to the Asset Purchase Facility at £659.0 billion. The balance sheet data covers five quarters of historical consolidated data on BoE assets and liabilities.
